item.title: 👎Donna Alber - Legal Defense Fund
item.description: Donna Alber signed up to testify Con.

item.title: 👎💵Candice Bock - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Candice Bock signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.
